system.description:
Your blade cuts as deeply as your wit. Choose this subclass if you want to blend musical mastery with deadly bladework.

Class Complexity: ♦♦◊◊

LEVEL 3

Deft of Hand and Mind. Increase your max uses of Songweaver's Inspiration by DEX.

Songwoven Blade. Whenever you make a melee attack, you can expend a use of your Songweaver's Inspiration to do one of the following:

  • Add an additional WILL d4s to the damage, and choose ANY to be the Primary Die.
  • Degrade the target's Armor 1 step (Heavy » Medium » None) for 1 round.

LEVEL 7

The Setup. Whenever you miss an attack, regain 1 use of Songweaver's Inspiration (this expires when combat ends).

Inspired Defense. Whenever you expend a Songweaver's Inspiration charge, the beneficiary gains 10 Temp HP this round.

LEVEL 11

Ha-HA! Creatures you've Taunted have disadvantage when attacking you and disadvantage 2 when attacking others. Whenever you crit with a melee attack, you may Taunt them.

LEVEL 15

Ballad Blade. (1/round) You can use Songwoven Blade without spending a use of Songweaver's Inspiration (this still triggers Inspired Defense).
